<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Standing Spray](images/20-standing-spray.jpg)

Built on an easel, head-height when displayed. Visible from a distance — for chapels and gravesides where smaller arrangements get lost. White, blush, or all-green palette available.

## What's in it

- Stargazer lilies or white roses
- Carnations and chrysanthemums for body
- Magnolia leaves and ruscus
- Easel and oasis included

## Care

We deliver, set up, and collect after the service if you'd like — no pressure on the family on the day.
